name: wp_create_post
description: Create a post/page as a DRAFT on the client's STAGING site. Staging-autonomous write — no per-action approval, but the runtime must resolve the target to the client's staging_site_url and refuse any non-staging target.

site_ref.description: per-client STAGING site handle from clients/<client>/binding

status.description: created as draft by default; publishing to production is a separate approval-gated step
